backup.title: Data Safety & Backup
backup.enableAutoBackupDesc: Automatically backup your database to prevent data loss
backup.backupModeDesc: Choose when automatic backups should be created
backup.scheduledTimeDesc: Daily backup will be created at this time (local system time)
backup.retentionDesc: Older backups will be automatically deleted
backup.noBackupDesc: Create a backup to protect your data
backup.createManualDesc: Create a backup immediately (automatic backups run based on your settings)
backup.restoreDesc: âš ï¸ This will restore your last working backup and restart the application. Your current data will be replaced.
backup.restoreConfirm:
âš ï¸ WARNING: This will restore your last working backup and restart the application.

Your current data will be replaced with the backup data.

Are you sure you want to continue?
backup.restoreSuccess:
âœ… Database restored successfully!

The application will now restart.
backup.restoreWarning1: All current data will be permanently replaced with the backup data
backup.restoreWarning2: This action cannot be undone - make sure you have a recent backup
backup.restoreWarning3: The application will restart automatically after restore
backup.selectBackupFileError: Please select a backup file to restore
backup.noBackupsAvailable: No backup files available. Please create a backup first.
backup.restoreInProgressDetails: Please wait while we restore your database. This may take a few moments.
backup.restoreSuccessDetails: Backup file '{{filename}}' has been restored successfully.
backup.appWillRestart: The application will restart automatically in a few seconds...
backup.restoreErrorUnknown: An unknown error occurred during restore
backup.restoreFailed: Failed to restore backup. Your current data is safe.
